title: phaseolus vulgaris var. cardinalis
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. cardinalis, also known as red kidney bean, is a variety of the common bean (Phaseolus vulgaris) that is prized for its high nutritional value and distinct red color. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including antinutritional factors that can help lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of heart disease. The health benefits of red kidney bean include its high fiber content, which can aid in digestion and weight management, as well as its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and inflammation. Red kidney bean can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
